Weapon_effefts.vex: hits grant self advantage on next attack
Weapon_effefts.sap: hits give enemy disadvantage on their next attack
Weapon_effefts.graze: missed attacks deal your bonus in damage
Weapon_effefts.lifesteal: hits heal you for half the damage dealt

Conditions.disadvantage: compares 2 d20 rolls and takes lesser
Conditions.advantage: compares 2 d20 rolls and takes greater
Conditions.blinded: disadvantage on attack rolls and can't see
Conditions.charmed: can't attack charmer, ends if charmer attacks you
Conditions.frightened: disadvantage on attacks while enemy is in sight
Conditions.grappled: speed becomes 0, can't benefit from bonus to speed
Conditions.invisible: can't be seen without magic, advantage on attack rolls against you
Conditions.paralyzed: incapacitated, can't move, meleeattack rolls against you have advantage, any hit is a critical hit
Conditions.petrified: turns to stone, incapacitated, can't move, can't speak, and is unaware of surroundings
